processes_hinted: LRO stress / lysosome-related organelle pH change

compartments.label: Lumen
compartments.snippet: Labeled top-left; the extracellular space above the brush-border/microvilli of the intestinal cell.

compartments.label: Intestinal cell
compartments.snippet: Large box labeled bottom-left, containing most intracellular nodes.

compartments.label: LRO
compartments.snippet: Small circle (left) inside intestinal cell, text inside: 'LRO stress / pH increase'.

compartments.label: Mitochondria
compartments.snippet: Organelle (center) labeled 'Mitochondria'; contains UPR^mt, mtROS, +Fe3+ text.

compartments.label: Nucleus
compartments.snippet: Large reddish oval (bottom center) labeled 'Nucleus'; contains ESRE, cellular stress response genes, antimicrobial defence genes.

genes.snippet: Text node left, labeled 'TIR-1/SARM1' (SARM1 is ortholog label); inside Intestinal cell.
Yellow oval, sublabel 'MAPKKK'; kinase cascade left side inside Intestinal cell.
Yellow oval, sublabel 'MAPKK'; kinase cascade left side inside Intestinal cell.
Yellow oval, sublabel 'p38 MAPK'; kinase cascade left side inside Intestinal cell.
Purple box associated with Mitochondria, left side inside Intestinal cell.
Purple box, sublabel 'ATF-4'; connected from HSP-60 and UPR^mt (faint/uncertain arrow).
Purple box; receives input from mtROS/+Fe3+ and AMPK (uncertain routing).
Purple box; arrow to HIF-1 marked uncertain.
Purple box, sublabel 'FOXO'; receives input from PMK-1, sends arrows to nucleus genes.
Purple box, sublabel 'Nrf2'; part of stress-factor convergence cluster.
Purple box; part of stress-factor convergence cluster.
Purple box; receives arrow from PMK-1, sends arrow to antimicrobial defence genes.
Purple box labeled 'CEBP-1/2'; arrow to ZIP-2.
Purple box; receives from ZIP-4 and CEBP-1/2; arrows to ESRE and (uncertain T-bar) to antimicrobial defence genes.
Purple box, sublabel 'HNF-4'; far right at membrane; arrow to antimicrobial defence genes.
Blue transmembrane receptor glyph at membrane between Lumen and Intestinal cell.

tentative_edges.snippet: Pointed arrow from Pyocyanin (green hexagon, Lumen) to TIR-1/SARM1 (left arm).
Pointed arrow from TIR-1/SARM1 to LRO (stress/pH increase).
Pointed arrow from LRO stress/pH increase to NSY-1 (MAPKKK).
Pointed arrow NSY-1 → SEK-1 in kinase cascade.
Pointed arrow SEK-1 → PMK-1 in kinase cascade.
Pointed arrow PMK-1 → DAF-16/FOXO.
Pointed arrow PMK-1 → ATF-7 (lower branch).
Pointed arrow ATF-7 → antimicrobial defence genes (inside Nucleus).
Pyoverdine line descends from Lumen to Mitochondria region (+Fe3+); uncertain routing.
Pointed arrow leftward from Mitochondria to HSP-60.
Faint/uncertain pointed arrow HSP-60 → ATFS-1/ATF-4.
UPR^mt (inside Mitochondria) associated with ATFS-1/ATF-4 by pointed arrow.
Pointed arrow ATFS-1/ATF-4 → cellular stress response genes in Nucleus.
mtROS / +Fe3+ → HIF-1; uncertain routing flagged in transcription.
Arrow AMPK → HIF-1 marked uncertain in transcription.
Pointed arrow HIF-1 → nucleus genes (downward into oval).
ExoA --| Translation; T-bar inhibition of Translation node (best reading from transcription). [unconfirmed against figure in verification]
Pointed arrow ZIP-4 → ZIP-2.
Pointed arrow CEBP-1/2 → ZIP-2.
Pointed arrow ZIP-2 → ESRE → cellular stress response genes inside Nucleus. [unconfirmed against figure in verification]
Uncertain T-bar from ZIP-2 to antimicrobial defence genes in Nucleus; end-type not fully resolvable. [unconfirmed against figure in verification]
Pointed arrow NHR-86/HNF-4 → antimicrobial defence genes inside Nucleus.
Pointed arrow DAF-16/FOXO → cellular stress response genes (and antimicrobial defence genes) inside Nucleus.
Pointed arrow SKN-1/Nrf2 → cellular stress response genes inside Nucleus.
Pointed arrow HSF-1 → cellular stress response genes inside Nucleus.
ROS node with uncertain downward arrow into defence/stress genes; end-type and exact routing not fully resolvable.
FSHR-1 transmembrane receptor implied to transduce Lumen signals into Intestinal cell; direct downstream target not explicitly drawn. [unconfirmed against figure in verification]
